payload.label: dresser
payload.long_description: Low, long dark-stained wooden dresser with a glossy finish, recessed-panel drawer fronts and multiple round knobs; floor-standing piece occupying the foreground, partially cropped at the left and right edges, estimated ~1.5 m from the camera.
